name: Farmers And Merchants Bank
description_short: Locally owned community bank in Arnett, Oklahoma, offering checking, savings, loans, and digital banking services since 1908.
description_long:
Farmers & Merchants Bank is a community-focused financial institution chartered in 1908 and headquartered in Arnett, Oklahoma. The bank operates as a locally owned and managed institution with a mission to serve the financial needs of Arnett and surrounding areas. With over $45 million in assets and a staff of 9 full-time employees, FMB maintains a small-town banking presence where customers know their bankers personally.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of traditional banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, various loan products (agricultural, personal, and commercial), VISA debit cards, safe deposit boxes, and ATM access. Customers can manage their finances through multiple channels: Internet Banking for web-based account management, TeleBank for telephone banking via touch-tone phone, and in-person service at their single location at 225 E. Renfrow in Arnett. The bank also provides a 24-hour lost/stolen debit card hotline and standard banking conveniences like fund transfers and loan payments.

What distinguishes FMB is its emphasis on personalized, relationship-based banking in a rural market. The bank explicitly markets itself as a "Home Town Bank" where "We know our customers, and they know us." This contrasts with larger regional or national banks and positions FMB as an alternative for residents seeking face-to-face interactions and local decision-making. Their long operational history since 1908 suggests stability and deep community roots.

FMB is best suited for Arnett-area residents and small business owners seeking traditional community banking. The single location and small staff may limit convenient access for those outside the immediate Arnett area. Digital banking options are available but appear basic compared to modern fintech offerings. The website provides limited detail on loan terms, rates, or account specifications, requiring direct contact for full product information.
services: Personal, agricultural, and commercial loan products
VISA debit cards with ATM access
24-hour ATM service at 225 E. Renfrow, Arnett
pros: Locally owned and managed with 115+ years of operational history since 1908
Personal relationship banking model where staff know customers by name
24-hour ATM access at main location for account holders
Multiple digital banking channels including Internet Banking, TeleBank, and debit card access
Comprehensive loan products with dedicated loan officers available for consultation
Safe deposit box options in multiple sizes for valuables storage
24-hour lost/stolen debit card hotline (888-263-3370) for immediate fraud protection
$45+ million in assets provides stability and FDIC deposit insurance coverage
cons: Single branch location in Arnett, Oklahoma limits accessibility for non-local customers
Small staff of 9 full-time employees may result in longer wait times during peak hours
Website provides minimal information on interest rates, loan terms, fees, or account minimums
Limited technological infrastructure compared to regional or national banks
No mention of investment services, wealth management, or business banking specialization
best_for: Arnett, Oklahoma residents seeking personalized community banking relationships
Local small business owners needing flexible lending from decision-makers they know
Rural customers prioritizing in-person service and local ownership over digital convenience
Customers preferring relationship-based banking to online-only or large institutional options
diagnosis: Farmers & Merchants Bank is best for residents in and around Arnett, Oklahoma who value personalized, relationship-based banking from a locally owned institution with deep community roots. The main caveat is geographic limitation—customers outside the Arnett area will find limited branch access and should verify whether online/phone services meet their needs before opening an account.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
